title: MajorZwey's Blue Cobweb
description: This resuorce pack makes the cobwebs blue and adds them an outline for even better visibility!
body:
[![Discord Server Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325a89553e2cccaaac1327a84a2b339a0c1d7ff6.webp)](https://discord.gg/MY8YtmtC3M)     [![Youtube Channel Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca2512fe8cab08fdafee0d8f64757a0b29d57c7.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MajorZwey)

# Overview
This resuorce pack makes the cobwebs blue and adds them an outline for even better visibility!
# Features
- Blue cobwebs
- Cobweb **outline** for even more visibility
# My other packs
